message:
feat(python): numpy.allclose wrapper parity (franken_numpy-gmjx)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.allclose(a, b, rtol, atol,
equal_nan) so within-tolerance comparison matches numpy. Test covers
identical arrays, perturbations within default tol, beyond tol,
NaN with both equal_nan paths, scalar/array broadcasting, and
custom rtol/atol scaling tightening or loosening the comparison.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
